name: ana-hr-operations
description: High-standard client, recruiting, document, pricing, and invoice operations for Ana's HR company.

interface.shortDescription: Run Ana's auditable HR operating SOPs.
interface.longDescription: Execute named SOPs for multi-client control, first calls, kickoffs, job descriptions, recruiting delivery, offers, pricing, invoice drafts, and approved handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Show today's multi-client HR board and approval queue.
Run the approved offer, pricing, and invoice SOPs.
